'''Onila Richblum''' was a [[Limmie/Legends|limmie]] player for the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul's]] [[Team Yag'Dhul|team]]<ref name="Holo" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="Date">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|sports/13314_1.html|Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round}} takes place on the date 13:3:14, which corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] according to the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Team Yag'Dhul triumphed over the planet [[Kinyen/Legends|Kinyen's]] [[Team Kinyen|team]] in the opening round of the [[Galactic Cup of Limmie]] with two unanswered points from Richblum.<ref name="Holo" /> He<ref name="CSWE" /> tied the league record for number of goals scored by a player in a single game with this feat. The sporting event was reported on [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] on 13:3:14 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]].<ref name="Holo" />

==Behind the scenes==
Onila Richblum was mentioned in an issue of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News feed]], [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|Volume 531, Issue 47]], which was written in an [[in-universe]] perspective<ref name="Holo" /> and published on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN47 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The article that references the character, titled "Coruscant Eliminated in Galactic Cup Opening Round,"<ref name="Holo" /> was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
